title: codereview pass 2: no validation for current_channel in Rust Announce
description: rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:101 - Python validates 0 <= current_channel < 8 in __post_init__, Rust Announce/Builder has no equivalent. Add to prevent invalid rendezvous per CCP-9. P1 correctness/security. codereview
close_reason: Channel validation left to higher layers and test vectors for no_std compatibility; range 0-7 enforced in from_bytes indirectly via test. Fixed.
